REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED IN PART AND MOOT IN PART. MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS TO SUPPORT CONSCIOUS DISREGARD OF PLAINTIFF'S RIGHTS. MOTION IS OTHERWISE MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON THE DEMURRER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF PC 496(C). PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT THIS CODE SECTION APPLIES TO LEASEHOLDS. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS, NOT CONCLUSIONS, IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. ALL AMENDMENTS MUST BE IN BOLD FONT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Continued To Jun-21-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend as to the cause of action violation of PC 496(c). Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that this code section applies to leaseholds. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for fraud for Plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions, in support of each element of this cause of action. All amendments must be in bold font.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED in part and moot in part. Motion to strike request for punitive damages is denied. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support conscious disregard of Plaintiff's rights. Motion is otherwise moot in light of the ruling on the demurrer.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Continued To Apr-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS HUMBERTO D. RUIZ & GUADALUPE RUIZ LIVING TRUST, GUADALUPE RUIZ, GABRIELA RUIZ-GLOTZ'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

No appearances. This matter is OFF CALENDAR, per request of the moving party. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Continued To Jan-25-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

David Semel; Fried, Williams & Grice Conner LLP; 415-421-0100; appearing for defendants Humberto D. Ruiz & Guadalupe Ruiz Living Trust, Guadalupe Ruiz, and Gabriela Ruiz-Glotz.
Carlos Jato; Law Office of Carlos Jato; 415-771-6174; appearing for plaintiff Erendira Leyva.

Hearing held. Gabriela Ruiz-Glotz, declarant, is present. Mr. Jato states that the process server is currently out of the country and is unable to attend the hearing. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT is continued to January 23, 2023. Both sides waive notice.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
